parameters.name: active
parameters.label: Active
parameters.description: Turns the audio input on or off.

parameters.name: driver
parameters.label: Driver
parameters.description: Select between default DirectSound/CoreAudio, ASIO, or native device supported drivers.

parameters.name: device
parameters.label: Device
parameters.description: A menu of available audio devices to receive input from. Selecting

parameters.name: errormissing
parameters.label: Error if Missing
parameters.description: The will error if the specified device is not found.

parameters.name: rate
parameters.label: Rate
parameters.description: Audio input sample rate expressed in samples per second.

parameters.name: bufferlength
parameters.label: Buffer Length
parameters.description: The size of the input buffer, will effect latency.  The larger the buffer the more latency is introduced.

parameters.name: numchan
parameters.label: Number of Channels
parameters.description: When using Driver Blackmagic or AJA, use this parameter to set the number of channels.

parameters.description: Turning this on forces the channels to be " ".  A is the time between the last cook frame and the current cook frame.
